## Summary

Describe the outcome and why this change is needed.

## Architecture and scope

- [ ] This change respects module ownership and does not introduce shared business logic.
- [ ] Documentation or ADRs have been updated when an architectural decision changed.
- [ ] No unrelated feature work is included.

## Validation

- [ ] Formatting check passes.
- [ ] Lint passes.
- [ ] Type-check passes.
- [ ] Build passes.

## Accessibility and operations

- [ ] Interactive UI is keyboard-accessible and communicates state without color alone.
- [ ] External integration, configuration, privacy, and observability impacts were reviewed.
